title: perf: optimize seed upgrade workflow (25h → seconds)
author: Itachi-1824

gist.headline: Speedrunning the Seed upgrades
gist.blurb: We optimized the Spore to Seed auto-upgrade workflow, taking it from a 25-hour marathon down to mere seconds. Batch processing means you get your Pollen credits faster than ever.
gist.summary: Optimized the automated Spore to Seed tier upgrade workflow by replacing per-user subprocesses with batch SQL updates and adding concurrent GitHub API validation.
gist.impact: Contributors will now receive their Seed tier upgrades and daily Pollen credits almost instantly instead of waiting up to 25 hours.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee zooming incredibly fast with aviator goggles, dropping seeds into a garden, while the Robot companion holds a stopwatch looking amazed at the speed.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing tiny aviator goggles, zooming at high speed while dropping glowing green seeds into a digital garden. A chunky retro robot with a CRT monitor head holds a stopwatch showing '0:01', looking amazed. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel peach gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
